config.name: weekly-kudos-summary
config.prompt: Post the weekly kudos summary for the week that just ended (the ISO week BEFORE {fired_at:week}). Query the `kudos` table for that week, group by recipient, and post a single celebratory digest to the configured kudos channel. If nobody gave any kudos last week, post a short nudge instead of an empty digest.

skills.description: How to read a kudos out of a message — pull the recipient handle(s), the praise, and any themes; decide when info is missing and ask ONE clarifying question in-thread vs record straight away. Load at the START of every capture (Slack mention or chat), before you touch the store.

The data model — the `kudos` table columns, the `kudos_id` dedupe/idempotency scheme, and the per-recipient `people/<handle>.md` profile memory. Load before any table-append / memory-write so the row shape and dedupe key stay consistent.

The Monday digest — how to query last week's kudos, group by recipient, format the celebratory mrkdwn post, and what to do on a quiet week. Load when the weekly cron fires (or when someone asks for a summary on demand).
